packageRules.description: Every npm dep change ships in the image, so bump the wrapper version in the same PR — a new image tag gets published and downstream pins (Renovate) pick it up
Upstream Lunch Money tools: minor bump (the tool surface Claude sees changed) and reviewed manually — tool changes alter what an LLM can do to the finances
Distroless runtime is a rolling tag pinned by digest; digest bumps are routine security patches. No version bump — the weekly rebuild refreshes bases under the existing tag either way
